alias.title: Credential Alias
alias.description: Friendly identifier for this GitHub App installation.

appId.title: App ID
appId.description: GitHub App ID (found in the app settings).

installationId.title: Installation ID
installationId.description: GitHub App installation ID for the selected repositories.

privateKey.title: Private Key
privateKey.description: PEM-encoded private key for the GitHub App.

webhookSecret.title: Webhook Secret
webhookSecret.description: Webhook secret configured for the GitHub App.
